quote:
When unity is pledged without a steadfast wind, the banners flutter but lack a faithful compass.  

Sovereignty is as fragile as a pearl; to guard it you must trust in mutual respect rather than mere edict.  

A forgotten watch on a mountain’s heart is the silent scream that echoes long into the valley below.  

A single handshake with a wise king may be the first breath of change, yet the wind of history still guides the true path.  

Survival without the horizon is but a silent boat; the sea will reveal its depths regardless of where the sails are tacked.  

When a sloth mourns before its grand reveal, the forest remembers that every living creature is subject to the tide of fate.  

The sword of justice sharpens itself in the fire of integrity, yet it will not swing until the heart speaks honestly.
quote_preview: When unity is pledged without a steadfast wind, the banners flutter but lack a faithful compass.
